title: Client Heaven
description: A fully CLIENT SIDE modpack for survival with a bunch of optimization and QoL mods
body:
The "Client Heaven" modpack is a carefully curated collection of client-side mods for Minecraft, designed to enhance the game's visual experience without altering basic gameplay. With support for shaders, this modpack transforms the world of Minecraft into a stunning and engaging landscape.

Compatibility and Installation:

This modpack is designed to be compatible with most existing client-side mods for Minecraft. Installation is simple and straightforward, allowing players to easily customize their visual experience according to their preferences.

Note: Please be aware that this modpack is exclusively client-side, meaning it does not affect gameplay on multiplayer servers or in game modes where mods are not allowed. Be sure to check the server's modding policies before using this modpack in a multiplayer environment.
